summary: Video set to music with no speech, shallow focus and a warm color grade. Trump in a navy suit and red tie stands at a construction site on the White House grounds while journalists hold up phones to film him, points at architectural rendering boards on easels, and is shown in close-up. It ends on a black card with a white line-art White House and the text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

script.scene: Shallow-focus shot of Trump in a navy suit and red tie at the White House grounds construction site, framed over the shoulders of journalists holding up phones to film him. Music only.
Wider shot of Trump standing in the dug-out construction zone with rendering boards on easels beside him, a press pool to the right.
Trump gestures and points toward the easel boards showing architectural renderings with classical columns; construction materials and workers behind.
Close-up of Trump speaking, eyes closed mid-word, sunlight, blurred construction site and White House structures behind him.
End card on black: white line-art illustration of the White House with text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP (end card); tweet: 'New White House ballroom update just dropped'
